name: Maya Action: Bake Animation
description: Creates a Maya action to bake animation onto specified nodes over a frame range. Provide target node names comma-separated. Chain multiple action nodes together via actions_in/actions_out, then feed the final actions_out into a Maya Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    nodes = inputs.get('nodes') or self.get_parameter('nodes', '')
    frame_start = inputs.get('frame_start')
    if frame_start is None:
        frame_start = self.get_parameter('frame_start', 1)
    frame_end = inputs.get('frame_end')
    if frame_end is None:
        frame_end = self.get_parameter('frame_end', 100)
    sample_by = inputs.get('sample_by')
    if sample_by is None:
        sample_by = self.get_parameter('sample_by', 1.0)
    simulation = inputs.get('simulation')
    if simulation is None:
        simulation = self.get_parameter('simulation', True)

    action = {
        'type': 'bake_animation',
        'nodes': nodes,
        'frame_start': int(frame_start),
        'frame_end': int(frame_end),
        'sample_by': float(sample_by),
        'simulation': bool(simulation)
    }

    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added bake_animation action -> {nodes} (frames {frame_start}-{frame_end})')

    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
